intent: directive-first implementation packet for AE FLOW + Routex
actual_pass_summary: Batch 0 base contract helpers landed in both apps
Batch 1 route-pack export/import/preview/merge scaffolding landed in Routex
Batch 2 signed service summary + delivery confirmation generators landed in Routex
Batch 3 account-code generation and offline lookup lane landed across AE FLOW + Routex
Batch 4 voice-note lane base UI/storage hooks landed in Routex
Batch 5 heat score base lane landed across AE FLOW + Routex
Batch 6 pseudo-map board base lane landed in Routex
Batch 7 multi-day trip pack base lane landed in Routex
Batch 8 proof-registry scaffolding landed in Routex
Batch 9 optional hybrid planner placeholder lane landed in Routex without becoming a blocker
Pass 2 added heat-based sorting and hottest-visible selection to the AE FLOW route builder
Pass 2 deepened trip packs with per-day lodging/closeout editing and trip-level expense editing
Pass 2 deepened proof machinery with integrity scans, latest-per-lane aggregation, and proof-summary export
Pass 3 added AE FLOW Routex account-lens filters and offline Routex dossier views
Pass 3 added route heat / route-pack / trip-pack / proof-doc summaries to Routex route list/detail surfaces
Pass 3 deepened proof machinery with scan-all and save-all structural proof helpers
Pass 4 added AE FLOW pack-seed export from visible filtered account groups
Pass 4 added a Routex AE FLOW pack-seed manager that can build routes or queue saved seeds
Pass 4 deepened proof machinery with fresh-fixture seeding, legacy-fixture seeding, proof snapshots, and diagnostics JSON export
Pass 5 added AE FLOW Routex saved-view presets with apply/save/delete/export controls
Pass 5 carries saved-view metadata forward into AE FLOW pack seeds for Routex
Pass 5 added route-pack fingerprints to export/import, summary HTML, preview, and index records
Pass 5 deepened proof machinery with lane eligibility scoring, lane-bundle runs, lane-summary HTML export, and snapshot comparison
Pass 6 adds AE FLOW saved-view proof logging, proof-log export, and Routex-lens HTML export
Pass 6 upgrades the AE FLOW saved-view / pack-seed lane with an in-app roundtrip proof that verifies view metadata survives into Routex pack seeds
Pass 6 extracts a reusable Routex backup-payload builder and adds local backup-roundtrip restore proof support for the started lanes
Pass 6 adds lane-specific Routex action probes that render target views and modals to check core control presence before saving proof states
Pass 6 upgrades optional hybrid tie-ins from note-only placeholders into offline-safe geocode queue, sync outbox, and hybrid bundle export/import surfaces
Pass 7 adds a second-device-style route-pack transfer rehearsal with transfer-log persistence and fingerprint-aware proof notes
Pass 7 adds historical restore-loop proof logging across baseline/fresh snapshots for the selected lane
Pass 7 adds full proof sweep execution, click-sweep HTML export, transfer-log export, and restore-log export inside Proof Registry
Pass 7 strengthens optional hybrid tie-ins with queue export/clear controls and inline queue visibility
Pass 7 adds AE FLOW full Routex lens sweep logging and Routex workbench HTML export
Pass 8 adds a historical generation matrix that replays downgraded legacy-style backup variants per lane and logs compatibility outcomes
Pass 8 adds a Routex operator-audit assistant with lane-specific walkthrough checklists and stored audit logs
Pass 8 adds a unified closure-report HTML export covering proof eligibility, operator audits, generation-matrix state, and latest heat-audit status
Pass 8 upgrades heat scoring with a multi-outcome heat-walk proof, heat-audit logging, and exportable heat-audit HTML
Pass 8 adds AE FLOW Routex closure-report export and toolbar-level operator-audit logging
Pass 9 adds Routex closure-bundle storage, fingerprinted closure-bundle JSON/HTML export, closure-bundle log export, and closure-bundle import into the Routex proof workspace
Pass 9 adds a directive closure campaign runner that captures baseline/after snapshots, runs closure attempts across all directive-first lanes, and saves the result as a stored closure bundle
Pass 9 adds direct closure-campaign and closure-bundle controls to Proof Registry plus a closure-bundle KPI/button in the Routex directive-first extras card

Pass 9 adds an AE FLOW Routex closure-bundle inbox that can import Routex closure-bundle exports, persist them locally, export the inbox as HTML/JSON, and surface imported-bundle counts in the toolbar
Pass 9 updates AE FLOW Routex workbench export so the latest imported Routex closure-bundle fingerprint/counts appear in the exported operator surface
Pass 10 adds a shared Routex closure outbox so Routex closure bundles can be pushed into a cross-app local bridge for AE FLOW without file handoff
Pass 10 adds a directive action-registry sweep in Routex that programmatically opens the key directive-first actions and logs the result as a button-sweep audit
Pass 10 adds a historical corpus sweep in Routex so current closure/eligibility state can be replayed as a local historical proof corpus instead of only one-off matrix rows
Pass 10 adds AE FLOW shared-outbox sync, sync-proof logging, sync-log HTML export, and a Routex sweep workbook export so cross-app closure visibility can be refreshed without manual JSON import
Pass 11 adds Routex cross-device proof capsules built from closure/proof/audit state, plus JSON/HTML export and a shared capsule outbox
Pass 11 adds Routex legacy-proof intake/import and lineage HTML export for historical package comparison
Pass 11 adds a Routex human-walkthrough workspace with saved/exportable operator checklist logs
Pass 11 adds AE FLOW capsule sync/inbox, legacy-proof import/inbox, and workbench visibility for latest capsule + legacy intake state
Pass 12 repairs exported-HTML script leakage that had been fragmenting both apps and restores syntax-clean script parsing in Routex + AE FLOW
Pass 12 adds a Routex completion center with exportable completion snapshots and device-attestation import/export/outbox support
Pass 12 adds an AE FLOW Routex device-attestation inbox/sync lane so closure evidence can cross the bridge cleanly

Pass 13 adds a dedicated Routex fresh-record proof runner that executes the directive-first lane bundles in one focused run, saves a fingerprinted fresh-proof log, exports HTML/JSON evidence, captures a completion snapshot, and pushes a device attestation into the shared AE FLOW bridge

Pass 14 adds an actual shipped transfer corpus from the real v25–v27 package history, a Routex shipped-transfer compare/export lane, and an AE FLOW compare sync surface so export/import proof is implementation-complete inside the package.

Pass 15 adds an actual shipped no-dead corpus from the real v26–v28 package history, a Routex shipped no-dead compare/export lane, and an AE FLOW compare sync surface while keeping the final human walkthrough requirement honest.

Pass 16 closes the no-dead-button implementation line by adding an in-app guided walkthrough closeout, launch receipts for the live proof actions, a Routex completion binder export lane, and an AE FLOW completion-binder sync surface.
notes: v31 closes the no-dead-button implementation line inside the package with a guided walkthrough closeout and completion binder lane; personal operator execution is still separate from code implementation.

v28 closes the export/import proof implementation line with an actual shipped transfer corpus from the real v25–v27 package history, shipped-transfer compare/export controls in Routex, and AE FLOW compare sync visibility.
v27 closed the legacy-record proof implementation line with an actual shipped legacy corpus and compare lane.
The project is still not finished; the remaining gap is now the no-dead-button line.
